steps.title: Use the table intersection
steps.content: The table already gives wind chill values for combinations of air temperature and wind speed. Find the row for air temperature $33^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Read across to 20 mph
steps.content: In that row, go to the column for wind speed $20$ mph. The row-column entry is $21^\circ\text{F}$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The problem says to disregard the degree symbol, so the answer is 21.
